taskTitle: Decide Digital Marketing runtime module strategy

decision.description: Digital Marketing adopts a hybrid runtime module strategy with domain-specific service boundaries
rationale: Digital Marketing has distinct operational domains (campaigns, connectors, analytics, persistence)
External connectors (Google Ads) require independent scaling and fault isolation
Campaign operations have different resource profiles than connector operations
Hybrid approach balances operational complexity with deployment flexibility
Aligns with existing service boundaries observed in DMOS architecture

runtimeModules.name: Campaign Runtime Module
runtimeModules.purpose: Core campaign management, lifecycle, and orchestration

runtimeModules.name: Connector Runtime Module
runtimeModules.purpose: External platform integration (Google Ads, Facebook, etc.)
runtimeModules.isolationReason: External API calls require independent fault boundaries and rate limiting

runtimeModules.name: Analytics Runtime Module
runtimeModules.purpose: Campaign performance analytics, reporting, and insights

runtimeModules.name: Persistence Runtime Module
runtimeModules.purpose: Data access layer with idempotency and transaction management

campaignToPersistence.description: Campaign runtime calls persistence module directly (shared library)

connectorToPersistence.description: Connector runtime calls persistence module directly (shared library)

analyticsToPersistence.description: Analytics runtime calls persistence module directly (shared library)

campaignToConnector.description: Campaign runtime publishes events for connector runtime to process external operations

connectorToAnalytics.description: Connector runtime publishes performance events for analytics runtime to aggregate

productRegistryUpdate.reason: Digital Marketing has defined a runtime module strategy with clear module boundaries and interaction patterns

migrationPlan.targetState: Hybrid runtime modules with independent deployment

phases.description: Extract persistence module as shared library
Separate connector runtime as independent service
Separate analytics runtime as independent service
Separate campaign runtime as independent service

alternativesConsidered.description: Single runtime module containing all components
alternativesConsidered.rejectedReason: Lack of independent scaling for connector operations, no fault isolation between domains
Excessive operational complexity, overhead outweighs benefits for current scale

alternativesConsidered.description: Lambda-style serverless functions for each operation
alternativesConsidered.rejectedReason: Cold start latency unacceptable for real-time connector operations, vendor lock-in concerns
